zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Morse於1500年出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，他的父親John Morse49歲，母親Agnes Chickering46歲。他於1516年與Agnes Mosse在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1551年10月5日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Morse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Morris  .
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames, especially   Moses  . Compare   Morris  .
History: Samuel Morse (1791–1872), inventor of the electric telegraph andof Morse code, was a direct descendant of Anthony Morse of Wiltshire,England, who had emigrated to MA in 1635.

variants.name: Morss
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and London): variant of   Morse  .

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Morse was born in 1500, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, John Morse, was 49 and his mother, Agnes Chickering, was 46. He married Agnes Mosse in 1516, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 5 October 1551, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

Il a épousé Agnes Mosse en 1516, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1551, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ru.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Morse родился в 1500 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Morse было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Chickering, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Mosse в 1516 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 5 октября 1551 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.
